tests.description: Go to tile with positive points → go_to
tests.input: Go to tile (4, 5) for +10 pts

tests.description: Avoid tile with explicit negative points → avoid
tests.input: Avoid tile (1, 1), penalty -20pts

tests.description: Traversal penalty (do not go through) → avoid
tests.input: Do not go through tile (2, 3) otherwise you lose 50pts

tests.description: Traversal penalty phrased as walking cost → avoid
tests.input: Tile (5, 5) costs you 50 points if you walk through it

tests.description: Delivery bonus 5x → go_delivery with multiplier
tests.input: Every time you deliver in (3, 4) you get 5x pts

tests.description: Delivery bonus 3x at different tile → go_delivery with multiplier
tests.input: Delivering at (0, 7) gives you 3x the normal reward

tests.description: Zero-point delivery tile → avoid_delivery
tests.input: Every time you deliver in (1, 2) you get 0 pts

tests.description: Delivery tile yields nothing → avoid_delivery
tests.input: Dropping packages at (4, 4) gives no points at all

tests.description: Italian: go to tile → go_to
tests.input: Vai alla casella (6, 2) per +15 punti

tests.description: Italian: traversal penalty → avoid
tests.input: Non passare per la casella (2, 2), perdi 50 punti

tests.description: Italian: delivery bonus → go_delivery
tests.input: Ogni volta che consegni in (3, 4) ottieni 5x punti

tests.description: Negative traversal phrased as avoidance with explicit loss → avoid
tests.input: Steer clear of (7, 1) or you lose 50 points

tests.description: x0 multiplier phrasing (admin style) → avoid_delivery
tests.input: delivery tile 6,13 gives x0 points

tests.description: x0.5 sub-1 multiplier → avoid_delivery
tests.input: delivery tile 4,7 gives x0.5 points

tests.description: Fractional reward phrasing (0.3 of standard) → avoid_delivery
tests.input: delivering to tile (2, 8) gives you 0.3 of the standard reward

tests.description: High bonus multiplier x200 → go_delivery
tests.input: delivery tile 2,13 gives x200 of the reward

tests.description: High bonus multiplier x100 → go_delivery
tests.input: delivery tile 2,13 gives x100 points

tests.description: Italian: x0 delivery → avoid_delivery
tests.input: Ogni volta che consegni in (6, 13) ottieni 0 punti

tests.description: Percentage fraction below 1 (30% of reward) → avoid_delivery
tests.input: Tile (5, 9) gives you only 30% of the normal reward when delivering

tests.description: Challenge: 'triple reward' delivery phrasing → go_delivery multiplier 3
tests.input: deliverying in 2,13 gives triple the reward

tests.description: Challenge: single-tile sub-message after split → go_delivery 5x
tests.input: Every time you deliver in (3, 4) you get 5x pts than in a regular delivery tile

tests.description: Second tile sub-message after split → go_delivery 5x
tests.input: Every time you deliver in (5, 6) you get 5x pts than in a regular delivery tile

tests.description: Challenge: traversal penalty phrasing → avoid with negative points
tests.input: Do not go through tile (3, 7) otherwise you lose 50pts
